data.title: DealHub secures $100M investment led by Riverwood Capital to redefine enterprise quote-to-revenue, signaling market leadership.
data.description: Yesterday in San Francisco, a noteworthy development took place as DealHub announced a substantial $100 million round of funding led by Riverwood Capital. This significant investment not only marks a milestone for the company but also sends a clear signal to the market. DealHub is solidifying its position as the leading entity in the agentic platforms category, showcasing its strength and potential in this emerging sector.

data.title: EquipmentShare, a US equipment rental provider, priced 30.5 million shares at $24.50 each in its IPO.
data.description: COLUMBIA, Mo., Jan. 22, 2026 - EquipmentShare.com Inc, a top player in connected jobsite technology and a major equipment rental provider in the U.S., has announced the pricing of its initial public offering. The company will offer 30,500,000 shares of its Class A common stock at $24.50 per share. The selling stockholders have also given underwriters a 30-day option to buy an extra 4,575,000 shares to cater to excess demand. This move signifies a significant step for EquipmentShare as it enters the public market and aims to raise funds for further expansion and development.

data.title: Cardano's ADA aiming for $0.37 rebound despite mixed signals. Analysts eye $0.43 high, key resistance at $0.37 critical.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ADA is currently trading at $0.36, with conflicting signals from analysts projecting a monthly high target of $0.43, despite bearish technical indicators. A crucial point for a potential bullish trend reversal lies at the key resistance level of $0.37.

data.title: XRP price aims for $4.49 by Dec 2026 despite current weakness at $1.92. Analysts predict surge; critical support at $1.87.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently trading at $1.92 despite a downward trend in the market. Analysts predict a possible increase to $4.49 by the end of the year. Technical analysis indicates that there is crucial support at $1.87 for XRP.

data.title: Capital One acquires fintech Brex for $5.15B, adding stablecoin capabilities after Brex's recent support for tokens.
data.description: In a recent development, Capital One acquired Brex, a move that could potentially enhance its stablecoin capabilities. This acquisition comes shortly after Brex introduced support for the tokens, marking a significant stride in the fintech sector. The integration of Brex's technology is expected to bolster Capital One's presence in the stablecoin market, with experts anticipating a surge in growth and adoption. The transaction reflects a strategic investment in innovation, signaling the quest for competitive advantage in the industry. As the companies join forces, they aim to capitalize on this synergy to navigate the evolving financial landscape and tap into the burgeoning stablecoin market. This acquisition could pave the way for new opportunities and collaborations, setting the stage for a transformative journey in the financial services realm.

data.title: White House faces criticism for altering woman's arrest photo, but insists 'memes will be ongoing' amid  push for stricter rules on edited media.
data.description: The White House recently faced criticism for distributing an altered arrest photo on a particular day, amid its efforts to enforce stricter regulations on manipulated content.

data.title: 85% of developers now use AI coding assistants, making Vibe coding mainstream. $2B market reshapes software dev in 2026.
data.description: Vibe coding tools have become the preferred choice in developer workflows, with an impressive adoption rate of 85%. This trend underscores the significant influence of these tools in the software development landscape, projecting a market value of $2 billion in 2026. This shift in preference towards Vibe coding tools is reshaping the way software development is conducted, leading to a notable transformation in the industry.

data.title: ETH price may reach $3,200-$3,400 in Feb 2026. Currently at $2,969, ETH needs to surpass $3,089 in 2-4 weeks for a possible uptrend.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ethereum is currently trading at $2,969, showing neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish momentum. Analysis indicates a possible upturn towards the $3,200-$3,400 range if Ethereum surpasses the resistance level of $3,089 in the next 2-4 weeks.

data.title: South Korea loses $47M in seized Bitcoin to phishing scam, authorities investigate the theft.
data.description: In South Korea, prosecutors have reportedly suffered a loss of $47 million in seized Bitcoin due to a phishing attack. They are currently conducting an investigation and monitoring the stolen funds.

data.title: Matson to pay $0.36 per share dividend on March 5, 2026, for first quarter to shareholders of record.
data.description: Today, the Board of Directors of Matson, Inc., a prominent U.S. carrier in the Pacific, announced a first quarter dividend of $0.36 per common share. This dividend is set to be paid on March 5, 2026 to shareholders of record as of the closing date.

data.title: International Tower Hill Mines increased public offering to US $65 million with private placement of US $40 million. TSX: ITH, NYSE American: THM.
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on January 22, 2026, International Tower Hill Mines Ltd. (TSX: ITH) (NYSE American: THM) disclosed the pricing and increase in size of their public offering. The offering now includes 29,280,000 common shares with no par value.
